title: Oil India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Oil India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!
